response.justification: Wei Chen has extensive experience across multiple languages and domains, including C++ (used in National Instruments role), but lacks recent, deep C++ expertise in industrial automation. While he demonstrates strong software engineering skills, secure development lifecycle practices (critical for IEC 62443), and cloud platform experience, his background is heavily frontend-focused (Node.js, React) with limited exposure to industrial protocols or on-premises automation systems. His security and architecture knowledge is strong but not directly aligned with the job's industrial cybersecurity requirements.
strengths: Strong C++ background with prior experience (National Instruments, Dunnhumby)
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies across domains
concerns: Limited recent C++ development in industrial automation contexts
No direct experience with IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks exposure to key industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA)
